bank.retain_mission: Extract bookkeeping policies, controls, close procedures, tax positions, and audit findings. Capture jurisdictional and entity-level decisions.
bank.observations_mission: Observations are stable facts about the entity's accounting policies, fiscal calendar, jurisdictions, materiality thresholds, and recurring control points. Ignore one-off journal entries.

mental_models.name: Policies & Controls
mental_models.source_query: What accounting policies, tax positions, and internal controls are in force? Include jurisdictions, materiality, and recent audit findings.

mental_models.name: Close & Tax Cycle
mental_models.source_query: What does the close and tax cycle look like? Include cadence, owners, recurring adjustments, and known reconciliation issues.
